nasb.text: When the sun goes down you shall surely return the pledge to him, that he may sleep in his cloak and bless you; and it will be righteousness for you before the Lord your God.

esv.text: You shall restore to him the pledge as the sun sets, that he may sleep in his cloak and bless you. And it shall be righteousness for you before the Lord your God.

cnv.text: 到了日落的時候，你要把抵押品還給他，好使他可以用自己的衣服蓋著睡覺，他就給你祝福，這在耶和華你的　神面前，就算是你的義了。

ccb.text: 要在当天日落之前还给他，好让他盖着外袍睡觉。他会因此祝福你们，你们的上帝耶和华也会将此视为你们的义行。
